headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Newmont (NEM) After Its 107% One Year Rally?
summary: If you are wondering whether Newmont at around US$107.61 still offers value after a strong run, the next sections will walk through what the numbers actually say about the stock. The share price total return has been mixed in the short term, with a 3.8% decline over 7 days and a 4.4% gain over 30 days, while the year to date return is 6.3% and the 1 year return stands at 106.9%, with 3 year and 5 year returns of 143.9% and 92.8% respectively. Recent coverage has focused on Newmont's position...
